---
title: "Malaria Control Strategy Lab"
filters:
  - shinylive
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 1200px
---

This lab allows you to explore different malaria control strategies given a fixed budget. Adjust the sliders to see the impact on malaria prevalence in children aged 2-10 ($PfPR_{2-10}$) and the associated costs.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Simulation Lab

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 800
#| file: app/app.R
```

## Presentation

You can view the lecture presentation here: [Lecture Presentation](presentation/overview.qmd).

:::

### Lab Instructions

1. **Phase 1:** Try to get $PfPR$ below 5% with **unlimited** budget.
2. **Phase 2:** Apply the $50,000 constraint.
3. **Phase 3:** Present your "Optimal Mix" to the class.

> **Note:** If your budget bar turns red, your strategy is disqualified!
